text: Integrating the Healthcare Enterprise (IHE) - IHE International IHE is an initiative by healthcare professionals and industry to improve the way computer systems in healthcare share information. IHE promotes the coordinated use of established standards such as DICOM and HL7 to address specific clinical needs in support of optimal patient care.

Systems developed in accordance with IHE communicate with one another better, are easier to implement, and enable care providers to use information more effectively. and improve the interoperability of healthcare information systems.

Read the state public health newborn screening programs case study Read the shared medication treatment plan case study Read National Portal for Digital Exchange COVID-19 Patient Data in The Netherlands.
